messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?
If I have two siblings, how many children does my grandmother have?

If you have two siblings, the number of children that your grandmother would have would be the sum of their birth numbers. For example, if your grandmother has a brother named John who has 4 siblings (born 1-3, 5-7, 9-11, and 13-15), John would have 2 siblings, and your grandmother would have 1 sibling each. The sum of their birth numbers would be 5, which would be the total number of children that your grandmother would have if you had 2 siblings.
